qa_pairs.question: Which specific Canadian Common CV (CCV) template must be used when submitting a CCV to the Digital Research Alliance of Canada?
qa_pairs.answer: When submitting a CCV to the Digital Research Alliance of Canada, only confirmation numbers for CCVs submitted using the Alliance template will be accepted. Confirmation numbers from other CCV templates, such as NSERC or CIHR, are not valid.

qa_pairs.question: What are the mandatory sections that must be completed in the Alliance Canadian Common CV (CCV) template?
qa_pairs.answer: The mandatory sections for the Alliance CCV template include Personal Information (Identification, Correspondence language), Education (Degrees), Employment (Academic Work Experience, Non-Academic Work Experience, Affiliations, Leaves of Absence and Impact on Research), and Research Funding History over the last five years.

qa_pairs.question: Who is required to submit a Canadian Common CV (CCV) for Alliance account renewal, and what is the validity period for the submission?
qa_pairs.answer: Submitting a CCV for Alliance account renewal is mandatory for all users with Faculty and Adjunct Faculty roles. It is optional for Emeritus Professors, Retired Faculty, and Librarians. To renew an account, the CCV must have been submitted within the last 300 days.
